headline: Merit Medtronic Deal Highlights ViaVerte Potential And MMSI Valuation Gap
summary: Merit Medical Systems (NasdaqGS:MMSI) has entered a new distribution agreement with Medtronic covering the FDA cleared ViaVerte basivertebral nerve ablation system. The expanded partnership focuses on commercializing a minimally invasive solution for chronic vertebrogenic low back pain through Medtronic’s established pain therapy channels. The agreement broadens Merit's presence in interventional pain management while adding a differentiated product to Medtronic’s neurointerventional and...
